delivery_criteria: implements three-gate pipeline: build gate (health < 70 -> 0), health gate (min(structure, hygiene) < 20 -> 0), value scoring
value scoring uses assertion formula: (PASS*100 + WARN*50) / TOTAL
fallback chain: assertions mode if beliefs.yml exists, completion ratchet if rhino.yml has value_hypothesis, default 10 otherwise
every score change is explainable from git diff + assertions diff
score reflects whether founder improved the product per their own beliefs, not external quality metric
numbers include context — assertion count shows % and maturity impact (e.g. '9 failures block polished')
stage ceiling shown inline when score exceeds stage threshold
synthesize.sh --text mode produces formatted summary with direction hints and bottleneck identification
craft_criteria: error paths explicit: missing rhino.yml -> default 10 with message, missing beliefs.yml -> completion ratchet, eval.sh timeout -> cached previous score with warning
malformed JSON from eval.sh -> fail fast with clear message naming the file
eval-cache.json pre-validated once before per-feature reads — corrupted cache prints one error, not N
critical 2>/dev/null sites replaced with actionable stderr: 'score: eval failed — <reason>. Run rhino eval . to debug'
missing code paths in features warn: 'eval: feature X lists code path Y that doesn't exist'
taste/flows/viability parse errors surface with recovery instructions
score jump >40 points triggers warning: 'confirm this is real improvement, not measurement error'
deterministic: running score.sh twice on identical code produces byte-identical output
cosmetic changes (comments, whitespace, variable renames) produce identical scores
known_gaps: score.sh at 1200+ lines — needs decomposition into lib/ functions
synthesize.sh --text has no color/bars — inconsistent with score.sh visual style
mktemp error capture pattern not DRY — 4 separate sites
no automated tests for error communication paths
